title: Germa and Big Mom Loom Ahead
description: On pages 12–15, this part focuses on germa and big mom loom ahead within the The Road to Whole Cake Island storyline.
scene: The story widens beyond Zou as the world prepares for the Reverie and the Sanji retrieval team moves toward Big Mom’s territory.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Glug ....!! GNG

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Just who the hell do you think I am?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: UAAGGHH!!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Now he's Trans- Formed into a raging drunk!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Straw hat Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: Trafalgar Law!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I know 'em alright! They're from that gener- action!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Someone who is

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: All they did was take out a shichibukai or two... and now they think they're really hot shit...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: They should be well aware that they've stuck their noses into my dealings by now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Gulp 01... Tell 'em.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Go on... tell 'em!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: "You idiots better run..."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: The next day we

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: "'Cuz up until now, you've simply been playing little pirate games!"

dialogue.text: Eustass

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Geography is a popular

dialogue.speaker: Bepo
dialogue.text: Captain

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: KIDD!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Return- ing to the thousand sunny

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Brrrr, it's freez- ing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I closed up the roof!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Good work.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Okay! The storm's gone,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: And I fixed the roof that the storm blew away!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I also kept the food safe so now everyone can dig right in!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Yaaay! Food! I'm starving!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: OH! Is it that good?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: It's the Luffy Special... My Secret "Random Curry"!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: luffy... you have to boil rice before you can eat it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What is this bitter purple stuff?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Why are there so many fish bones in here...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: And why'd you put in so much jam?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What is this strange, transparent, jelly-like substance...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What did we do to deserve this...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: bunch of ingrates. I go out of my way to make all of this for you all... sheesh.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Beecch! Gross!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: We told you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: How am I supposed to eat this?!

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: Sanji would be so mad if he saw how much food you wasted.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Don't ask us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Eh?! Where are all the provisions I stored here?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Ah... yeah... I messed up a bunch of times so I ended up having to use all of it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: You used our entire week's worth of supplies in one go?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Well, you were all so hungry!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: And thus Luffy and his friends found them- selves...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: What the heck are we supposed to eat now?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Right? I'm so hungry...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Face-to- face with Starva- Lion.

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: Sanji... save us...

summary: Germa and Big Mom Loom Ahead: The story widens beyond Zou as the world prepares for the Reverie and the Sanji retrieval team moves toward Big Mom’s territory.
